1→package com.shanfuchun.courtassistant.service
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
     5→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
     6→import okhttp3.MediaType.Companion.toMediaType
     7→import okhttp3.OkHttpClient
     8→import okhttp3.Request
     9→import okhttp3.RequestBody.Companion.toRequestBody
    10→import org.json.JSONArray
    11→import org.json.JSONObject
    12→import java.text.SimpleDateFormat
    13→import java.util.Locale
    14→import java.util.TimeZone
    15→import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
    16→
    17→object AiParser {
    18→
    19→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    20→        .connectTimeout(15, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    21→        .readTimeout(30, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    22→        .build()
    23→
    24→    private val JSON_TYPE = "application/json; charset=utf-8".toMediaType()
    25→
    26→    suspend fun enhance(context: Context, text: String, regexResult: HearingInfo): HearingInfo {
    27→        val key = context.getSharedPreferences("settings", Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
    28→            .getString("ai_api_key", null)
    29→        if (key.isNullOrBlank()) return regexResult
    30→
    31→        return withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    32→            try {
    33→                val prompt = "从以下法律文书中提取信息，以JSON格式返回，字段：\n" +
    34→                    "hearingTime(格式yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm), courtName, caseNo, location, partyName, judge\n" +
    35→                    "仅返回JSON，无其他文字。\n文书内容：\n$text"
    36→
    37→                val body = JSONObject().apply {
    38→                    put("model", "qwen-plus")
    39→                    put("messages", JSONArray().apply {
    40→                        put(JSONObject().put("role", "user").put("content", prompt))
    41→                    })
    42→                }.toString().toRequestBody(JSON_TYPE)
    43→
    44→                val req = Request.Builder()
    45→                    .url("https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1/chat/completions")
    46→                    .addHeader("Authorization", "Bearer $key")
    47→                    .post(body)
    48→                    .build()
    49→
    50→                val resp = client.newCall(req).execute()
    51→                if (!resp.isSuccessful) return@withContext regexResult
    52→
    53→                val raw = JSONObject(resp.body!!.string())
    54→                    .getJSONArray("choices").getJSONObject(0)
    55→                    .getJSONObject("message").getString("content")
    56→                    .replace(Regex("```json\\s*|```"), "").trim()
    57→
    58→                merge(regexResult, JSONObject(raw))
    59→            } catch (_: Exception) {
    60→                regexResult
    61→            }
    62→        }
    63→    }
    64→
    65→    private fun merge(base: HearingInfo, j: JSONObject): HearingInfo {
    66→        val sdf = SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm", Locale.CHINA).apply {
    67→            timeZone = TimeZone.getTimeZone("Asia/Shanghai")
    68→        }
    69→        return base.copy(
    70→            hearingTime = if (base.hearingTime != 0L) base.hearingTime
    71→                else try { sdf.parse(j.optString("hearingTime"))?.time ?: 0L } catch (_: Exception) { 0L },
    72→            courtName = base.courtName.ifEmpty { j.optString("courtName", "") },
    73→            caseNo = base.caseNo.ifEmpty { j.optString("caseNo", "") },
    74→            location = base.location.ifEmpty { j.optString("location", "") },
    75→            partyName = base.partyName.ifEmpty { j.optString("partyName", "") },
    76→            judge = base.judge.ifEmpty { j.optString("judge", "") }
    77→        )
    78→    }
    79→}
    80→
